meta.title: Factuur Studio – Pricing and Plans | Free or Pro from $4.99/month
meta.description: Explore Factuur Studio plans. Free for starters (5 invoices/month) or Pro from $4.99/month with unlimited invoices, OCR, templates, and more.

hero.title: Choose what fits you
hero.subtitle: Start free with basic features. Upgrade to Pro when you need more.

pro.name: Pro
pro.trialNote: No credit card needed for trial

upgradeLater.question: Can I upgrade later?
upgradeLater.answer: Yes! You can upgrade from Free to Pro anytime. You'll pay prorated for the remainder of the month.

contracts.question: What about contracts?
contracts.answer: No contracts! You can cancel your subscription anytime. No hassle, no hidden fees.

dataOnCancel.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
dataOnCancel.answer: All your invoices and customers remain available in your Free account. You won't lose anything!

reallyFree.question: Is the Free version really free?
reallyFree.answer: Yes! You can use the Free version for unlimited time. No credit card needed, no trial period. Really free.

payment.question: How do I pay?
payment.answer: We use Stripe for secure payments. We accept all major credit cards and other payment methods.

cta.title: Ready to invoice smarter?
cta.subtitle: Start free today. No credit card required.
